data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of sending a digital ticket to the client email/app. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality has been implemented or validated. The linked use case specifies the need for a digital ticket to be sent, but the evidence does not demonstrate that this requirement has been fulfilled, indicating a clear gap.
gaps: No evidence of digital ticket being sent to client email/app.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
